configs.text: If you see 🔀 in the button meaning that feature are sync with others and you can enable all features at the same time
If you see ⚠️ in the button meaning that feature are risky
If you got kicked with reason 'Do not try to lag the server...' that mean you config the supper fast attack delay too fast
RightAlt to toggle the ui on pc or emulator. For auto farm mastery please config it first in config page
Anti Ban will make you auto rejoin after 30m but you can disable it in config
Private is not safer than normal server, if you got catched by anti-cheat you will still get cook
Yоu саn rеаԁ mоrе аbоut blох fruіt аntі-сhеаt оn ԁіsсоrԁ.gg/hоhоhub
